name: craft
description: Full-stack developer toolkit with integrated workflow automation - 113 commands (99 craft + 14 workflow), 8 agents, 39 skills with standardized dry-run preview mode (29 with --dry-run support). Code, git, site, docs, testing, architecture, CI, distribution, teaching workflows, planning, release pipeline, and ADHD-friendly features including brainstorming, task management, and spec capture
